title: 2024 Yukon River Chinook Run Timing Forecast
summary: Yukon River Chinook are predicted to arrive on the delta just slightly later than average in 2024: The first significant pulse (15% point) is expected by June 14th and 50% of the run is expected to have arrived by June 23rd. April mean air temperature at the Nome, AK airport (AMATC) was -4.3°C, slightly warmer than the long-term average of -6.6°C (range -17.1°C to 1.3°C). May mean sea surface temperature (MSSTC) measured along the migratory route between the delta and St. Lawrence Island was -...

title: Regular Harbor Commission Meeting Scheduled for June 12, 2024 is Canceled.
summary: The Regular Harbor Commission Meeting for 12 June 2024 is canceled. The next regular meeting is scheduled for 10 July 2024 The post Regular Harbor Commission Meeting Scheduled for June 12, 2024 is Canceled. appeared first on City of Cordova, Alaska .
